stories.title: England end Mexico's World Cup with best win on fo...
stories.summary: Outside of England, the Three Lions' World Cup history is mixed at best, but they defied the odds to grind out an emotional last-16 win over Mexico.

stories.title: World Cup VAR review: Quansah's red, Kane's penalt...
stories.summary: Andy Davies breaks down all three major incidents from England's topsy-turvy 3-2 win over Mexico.

stories.title: England survive to beat Mexico in Azteca thriller
stories.summary: England survived a raucous Azteca Stadium atmosphere and a red card early in the second half to prevail past co-hosts Mexico 3-2 in a thrilling World Cup round-of-16 clash in Mexico City on Sunday.

stories.title: FIFA suspends Balogun red card, can face Belgium
stories.summary: FIFA has suspended the red card U.S. striker Folarin Balogun received in the team's match against Bosnia-Herzegovina, making him available to face Belgium in the round of 16 at the World Cup.

stories.title: Belgium furious at Balogun U-turn: It's April Fool...
stories.summary: Belgium coach Rudi Garcia said he thought it was a joke when he first heard news that suspended United States striker Folarin Balogun was cleared to play in the Americans' round-of-16 match.
